Klein Moretti.eye_color: deep dark brown, appearing pitch black like the night
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, matching brown coat, round felt hat, old leather shoes
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, brown eyes, dressed in a sharp black tuxedo and silk top hat, carrying a plain cane.
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Capable of using Spirit Vision and touching dark red stars in the gray fog.
Klein Moretti.accessories: Silver pocket watch kept in tuxedo inner lining, black cane
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Described explicitly wearing this outfit instead of his formal suit to walk in the heat.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Seen tapping a plain cane while negotiating rent.

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: black hair that reached down her back
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned when she was looking at the new house.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: Died by repeatedly hitting his head against a wall
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Police confirmed his death by apparent suicide in his house.

Wendy Smyrin.primary_clothing: modest Victorian dress, perhaps with an apron
Wendy Smyrin.face_description: wrinkled, kind face with a genial smile
Wendy Smyrin.visual_anchor: seventy-plus female, completely grayish-white hair, kind wrinkled face with a genial smile, wearing a modest Victorian dress
Wendy Smyrin.source_notes: Described with a head of gray hair and mentioned she moved from the South over 40 years ago.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.primary_clothing: Unique classic black robe that appears anachronistic, paired with a black felt hat with a rounded edge.
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Uses a double-tap to the glabella as a practical shortcut for Spirit Vision
Old Neil.accessories: Classic black felt hat with a rounded edge; darkwood ladle for potion stirring.
Old Neil.source_notes: Old Neil demonstrates the glabella-tapping 'switch' to Klein as a more efficient method than pure cogitation.

Captain.primary_clothing: dark maritime captain's coat over a simple shirt
Captain.face_description: sharp, sea-weathered features with a stern gaze
Captain.visual_anchor: mid-30s male, tanned skin, windblown black hair, athletic build, wearing a dark maritime captain's coat
Captain.source_notes: Mentioned by Alger as the recipient who wants the Ghost Shark's blood.

Daly.face_description: Uncanny beauty, adorned with bright blue eyeshadow and prominent blush.
Daly.visual_anchor: mid-20s female, pale skin, twinkling emerald eyes, bright blue eyeshadow and blush, wearing a hooded black robe and an exposed silver bracelet with a white crystal pendant
Daly.color_palette: black, emerald green, cobalt blue, silver
Daly.accessories: silver bracelet with a hanging white crystal pendant, waist pouch containing glass bottles
Daly.source_notes: Identified as a Sequence 7 Spirit Medium.

Animal Trainer.primary_clothing: circus performer attire, practical and slightly worn
Animal Trainer.face_description: weathered face from traveling, sharp observant eyes
Animal Trainer.visual_anchor: female circus animal trainer in practical performer attire with a weathered face
Animal Trainer.color_palette: dusty brown, faded red, canvas white
Animal Trainer.source_notes: Mentioned retrospectively as the female animal trainer from the circus troupe who helped Klein tell his fortune.

Divination Club Attendant.primary_clothing: neat formal working uniform appropriate for a respectable club attendant
Divination Club Attendant.face_description: beautiful face with a polite, welcoming smile
Divination Club Attendant.visual_anchor: beautiful young female attendant with coiled brownish-yellow hair wearing a neat club uniform
Divination Club Attendant.source_notes: Appears at the end of the chapter as a beautiful female attendant with coiled brownish-yellow hair.
